title: stelis granulosa
intro: Stelis granulosa is a species of orchid native to tropical regions of Central and South America. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of respiratory issues and as an anti-inflammatory agent. The health benefits of Stelis granulosa include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate coughs, and soothe sore throats, making it a valuable remedy in traditional medicine. In terms of herbal preparations, Stelis granulosa is typically dried and made into a tea or infused in hot water to release its active compounds, which are then used to treat various health conditions.
